svg.text: Wall Jumping huh...? Now there's an interesting topic. Most scratch platformer projects create a type of wall jumping that works by allowing the player to jump again if they simply touch a wall. However in general they can then scale a single wall by bouncing up it's edge (because they can change direction in the air). This mechanic can be quite fun, but isn't how wall jumping tends to work in many professional games? However, due to the complexity of scripting code to hang onto a wall, slide down it and jump off, perhaps we should at least cover the simple case first...
